entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for rust resistance in India

entities.name: STRIPE RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease of wheat caused by Puccinia striiformis

entities.name: LEAF RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease of wheat caused by Puccinia triticina

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The individual factors that contribute to the overall grain yield

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of a plant to resist attack by a pathogen

entities.name: NON-RACE-SPECIFIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance that is effective against all races of a pathogen

entities.name: RACE-SPECIFIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance that is effective only against certain races of a pathogen

entities.name: PUCCINIA STRIIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes stripe rust in wheat

entities.name: PUCCINIA TRITICINA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes leaf rust in wheat

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill or inhibit the growth of fungi

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL EPIPHYTOTIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Controlled environmental conditions used to induce disease outbreaks

entities.name: ADULT PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance that is expressed in the adult stage of the plant

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Quantitative measures used to describe the progress of a disease in a population

entities.name: APR GENES
entities.description: Genes associated with adult plant resistance

entities.name: SLOW RUSTING RESISTANCE
entities.description: A form of resistance that slows the rate of disease development

entities.name: VARIETAL DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to create improved crop varieties

entities.name: DURABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance that remains effective over a long period and across different environments

entities.name: VIRULENT RACES
entities.description: Strains of a pathogen capable of overcoming host resistance

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the wheat cultivars were studied
